# Taquería Los Panditas — Salem, OR
> Taquería Los Panditas is an authentic Mexican restaurant in Salem, Oregon — tacos, burritos, tortas and more, made fresh. Dine in, take out or catering. Bilingual (English/Spanish). 3892 State St. Call (503) 365-8226. An East Salem taquería on State St — fresh tacos, burritos and aguas, dine in or take out.

## Services
- Tacos
- Burritos
- Tortas
- Combo Plates
- Drinks & Aguas
- Take-out & Catering

## Service area
- Salem, Keizer, West Salem, Marion County (ZIPs: 97301)

## Contact
- Call/text: (503) 365-8226 · Hours: Daily 9am–10pm · Languages: English, Español
